calculatePathPrefixes(String, Collection<String>) - Method in interface org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.client.api.connected.ConnectedSonarLintEngine
Tries to find the best way to match files in a IDE project with files in the sonarqube project identified with projectKey, by finding file path prefixes to be used later in other interactions with the project storage.
